name: Jedat Inc.
summary: Jedat Inc., a research and development oriented company, develops, sells, and distributes electronic design automation (EDA) software for designing semiconductor devices and chips (LSIs) and liquid crystal display panels worldwide. It offers Alpha-SX, an EDA software that is used in semiconductor design applications, as well as a range of applications, such as flat-panel displays, MEMS, lead frames, and semiconductor packages. The company also provides LSI, flat panel display, and fine pattern design solutions. In addition, it offers training services related to EDA software; development services for custom software, PDK for specific process, and specific Spice model; and analog LSI design consulting services, as well as design environment building and improvement support services. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Jedat Inc. is a subsidiary of ARGO GRAPHICS Inc.
